title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27
slides: Your iPhone will soon predict what you need before you tap.
iOS 27 adds on-device AI for real-time language translation.
It can read your emails to draft replies without sending data.
You will now get proactive calendar suggestions from messages alone.
Test Siri's new offline mode to see your own privacy gains.
thread_text:
1. Your iPhone already knows.

Apple’s on-device AI scans your messages to draft replies — without ever sending data to the cloud.

2. Real-time translation, zero lag.

iOS 27 processes language locally, so your iPhone translates calls instantly, even without internet.

3. Your calendar reads texts.

Proactive suggestions pop up from message content alone — flights, dinners, deadlines — no manual entry needed.

4. Offline Siri, full privacy.

Test the new offline mode: Siri responds locally, and your speech never leaves the device.

5. Try this on your iPhone today.

Open Settings, tap Siri & Search, and enable Offline Mode. What data did you just keep private?
video_script: Your iPhone predicts what you need before you tap.
On-device AI translates calls in real time.
It drafts replies from your emails locally.
Calendar suggestions come straight from messages.
Test offline Siri — see your privacy gains.

script: Your iPhone predicts what you need before you tap.
On-device AI translates calls in real time.
It drafts replies from your emails locally.
Calendar suggestions come straight from messages.

instagram.caption:
Your iPhone will soon finish your sentences by scanning your messages on-device — no data ever leaves your hand. 📱

iOS 27 translates calls in real-time without internet. Your calendar reads texts to auto-suggest flights or deadlines. Siri works fully offline, keeping your speech private.

For you as a creator: drafts appear from email content alone, cutting reply time and eliminating cloud risk.

Open Settings, tap Siri & Search, enable Offline Mode — what message data just stayed local on your phone? 🔒
